svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="WIcRTjoIalbdXDmBlM2n"> <mxGraphModel dx="1471" dy="826" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram
 actor Admin
 participant C as SuscriptorController
 participant H as StoreSuscriptorHandler
 participant EB as EventBus
 participant EH as SendVerificationEventHandler
 participant Email as EmailService

 Admin->>C: POST /api/notificacion/suscriptores
 C->>H: dispatch(StoreSuscriptorCommand)
 H->>EB: publish(SendVerificationToSuscriptorEvent)
 EB->>EH: handle event
 EH->>Email: send(enlace firmado de verificación)
 Note over Email: El usuario recibe el email
 actor U as Usuario
 U->>C: GET /suscriptores/verificar/{suscriptorId} (signed)
 C->>H: dispatch(VerifySuscriptorCommand)
 H-->>U: verified_at = now()",
 "config": null
